articles.title: Alcoa Bets on Aluminum With $5.6 Billion South32 Deal

articles.title: Oil Edges Up as Peace Talks Continue, Hormuz Traffic Recovers
articles.summary: Oil inched higher after the biggest quarterly drop since the pandemic, as traders monitored peace talks between the US and Iran and the return of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: Asian Stocks Rise After US Tech Gains, Yen Steady: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: Asian equities rose Wednesday after capping their best quarter in 17 years, as a rally in chipmakers and signs of US economic resilience fueled optimism about corporate earnings.

articles.title: Vimeo Parent Bending Spoons, Backers Raise $1.68 Billion in IPO
articles.summary: Bending Spoons SpA, which acquires struggling software businesses, and some of its backers raised $1.68 billion in a US initial public offering priced above a marketed range.

articles.title: Paris-Educated Economist Tapped as Colombian Finance Chief
articles.summary: Colombian President-elect Abelardo de la Espriella named Miguel Gómez to be his finance minister, tapping the former lawmaker from a conservative political dynasty to curb a rising national debt load

articles.title: US Labor Market Steady as Stocks Gain
articles.summary: US stocks advanced on Tuesday as the main indexes notched their best quarter in six years and traders parsed the latest economic data. Bloomberg's Enda Curran has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: Gold Steadies as US-Iran Peace Talks Frame Inflation Outlook
articles.summary: Gold was steady, with traders assessing peace talks between the US and Iran and weighing a fresh slew of US economic data for clues on the Federal Reserve’s next move on interest rates.

articles.title: Trump Reports at Least $1.4 Billion in 2025 Crypto Earnings
articles.summary: President Donald Trump reported earning at least $1.4 billion in 2025 from crypto and memecoin-related businesses, according to his latest annual financial disclosure.

articles.title: Nike Sees Weakness Persisting as Wall Street Patience Wears Thin
articles.summary: Nike Inc. executives on Tuesday gave a cautious outlook and warned about elevated consumer anxiety, adding to investor concerns about the sportswear company’s painfully slow turnaround.

articles.title: Oaktree Capital-Backed ITG Raises $312.2 Million in US IPO
